# Vendored third-party assets

- **xterm.js** (`xterm.js`, `xterm.css`) — the terminal emulator that powers the
  browser board at `/terminal`. Version 5.5.0, the UMD build.
  Copyright (c) 2017 The xterm.js authors. MIT License.
  <https://github.com/xtermjs/xterm.js>

These files are vendored (not fetched from a CDN) so the Vendetta/X binary stays
self-contained: everything the web face needs is embedded in the executable.
